title: Transportation, Storage, and Distribution Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate transportation, storage, or distribution activities in accordance with organizational policies and applicable government laws or regulations. Includes logistics managers.

tasks.text: Supervise the activities of workers engaged in receiving, storing, testing, and shipping products or materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, develop, or implement warehouse safety and security programs and activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect physical conditions of warehouses, vehicle fleets, or equipment and order testing, maintenance, repairs, or replacements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan, organize, or manage the work of subordinate staff to ensure that the work is accomplished in a manner consistent with organizational requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other departments to integrate logistics with business systems or processes, such as customer sales, order management, accounting, or shipping.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze all aspects of corporate logistics to determine the most cost-effective or efficient means of transporting products or supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Resolve problems concerning transportation, logistics systems, imports or exports, or customer issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and document standard and emergency operating procedures for receiving, handling, storing, shipping, or salvaging products or materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor operations to ensure that staff members comply with administrative policies and procedures, safety rules, union contracts, environmental policies, or government regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze the financial impact of proposed logistics changes, such as routing, shipping modes, product volumes or mixes, or carriers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor inventory levels of products or materials in warehouses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish or monitor specific supply chain-based performance measurement systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and manage departmental budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor product import or export processes to ensure compliance with regulatory or legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare management recommendations, such as proposed fee and tariff increases or schedule changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview, select, and train warehouse and supervisory personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise sales and billing departments of transportation charges for customers' accounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze expenditures and other financial information to develop plans, policies, or budgets for increasing profits or improving services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with department heads to coordinate warehouse activities, such as production, sales, records control, or purchasing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement specific customer requirements, such as internal reporting or customized transportation metrics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain metrics, reports, process documentation, customer service logs, or training or safety records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Examine invoices and shipping manifests for conformity to tariff and customs regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or implement energy saving changes to transportation services, such as reducing routes, optimizing capacities, employing alternate modes of transportation, or minimizing idling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate contractors or business partners for operational efficiency or safety or environmental performance records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Negotiate with carriers, warehouse operators, or insurance company representatives for services and preferential rates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement plans for facility modification or expansion, such as equipment purchase or changes in space allocation or structural design.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct inbound or outbound operations, such as transportation or warehouse activities, safety performance, and logistics quality management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or implement improvements to internal or external systems or processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend or authorize capital expenditures for acquisition of new equipment or property to increase efficiency and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review invoices, work orders, consumption reports, or demand forecasts to estimate peak performance periods and to issue work assignments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
